title: Feature Request: Integration Recipes Redesign & Additional UI Features
excerpt: Currently the recipes order after when created, it would be helpful to set the order of the recipes. Specially when releasing new recipes that are similar to previous recipes it quickly become unorganized. The overview c…

posts.author: SindreSvee (Sindre Svee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the recipes order after when created, it would be helpful to set the order of the recipes. Specially when releasing new recipes that are similar to previous recipes it quickly become unorganized. The overview could need some additional UI improvements

  • Add the ability to create groups in recipe integrations
  • Add the ability to create reorder recipes & groups in recipe integrations
  • Add list view as an view in recipe integrations
  • Better optimization on different screen sizes (Currently text overflow outside boxes, and the boxes are too small for long text strings. Making it difficult/impossible to read/configure).

posts.author: SindreSvee (Sindre Svee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add the ability to reorder integration recipes

Currently they order after when created, it would be helpful to set the order of the recipes. Specially when releasing new recipes that are similar to previous recipes it quickly become unorganized.
